name: Physics Wallah
description: India's affordable edtech platform for JEE, NEET, UPSC, and school exam preparation with live classes, video lectures, and 300+ offline centers
pros: Most affordable edtech in India — all course packages under Rs 5,000
303 offline centers across 152 cities for hybrid learning
Strong YouTube presence with 13M+ subscribers for free content
AI-powered doubt solving and mentor support via Saarthi feature
cons: App crashes and performance issues frequently reported
Customer support relies heavily on chatbots with slow human response
Strict no-refund policy for online batches
Primarily focused on competitive exam prep — limited for general learning
userComplaints: App crashes during live classes and lectures don't load properly
Refund process is extremely difficult — support sends auto-generated emails
Account gets blocked without clear reason and poor moderation
